items.name: Crimson Winter Scarf
items.description: Baby, it's cold outside.

items.name: Ostrichsized Winter Scarf
items.description: What does it mean to be Ostrichsized?  Ostrichsized means kicking in the teeth of any man who chooses to fight a horse-sized duck over a hundred duck sized horses.  It means fighting robotic dinosaurs with a laser sword dipped in unicorn tears for fun.  It means wearing a scarf for a California winter.

items.name: Purple Winter Scarf
items.description: Brr... it's cold in here! There must be some winter in the at-mos-phere!

items.name: Orange Winter Scarf
items.description: The bright spot in your weary winter day.

items.name: Tickets Tie
items.description: Tickets tie - for when you mean business.

items.name: Bling $$ Necklace
items.description: It's not a subtle way to say anything.  But if you're rich enough to wear this, there's no need for subtlety.

items.name: Spooky Tie
items.description: Is there a day that's spookier than Friday the 13th?

items.name: Dragon Claw Necklace
items.description: The power of the mighty dragon claw is yours in this enchanted necklace.

items.name: Wild Neon Blue Scarf
items.description: You know it's not made from real animals because you can't find that color in nature!

items.name: Epic Face Tie
items.description: You're epic and you've got the tie to prove it!

items.name: Red Hipster Scarf
items.description: I was wearing plaid before it was cool.

items.name: ROBLOX Tie
items.description: You're fit to be tied. Prize in the build a ROBLOX HQ contest.

items.name: Harmonious Scales Scarf
items.description: "Can you hear the rhythm of my scarf, can you hear my notes shine through the dark?"

items.name: Bombastic Boa
items.description: As bold and dangerous about the deal you're about to make.

items.name: Golden Carrot Necklace
items.description: 24 carrot magic.

items.name: Disguise Scarf
items.description: This scarf obscures your identity, but not your motives.

items.name: Neon Green Bow Tie
items.description: Bright style for a fashionable life.

items.name: Bat Tie
items.description: It will drive you bat-tie....get it?  This came out of the Stylized Gift of Chrioptera on October 13th, 2011.

items.name: Green Bow Tie
items.description: The first limited edition item ever! Own a piece of history.

items.name: Green Leaf Scarf
items.description: I just can't leaf this scarf at home, it's really grown on me!

items.name: GoldLika: Boss
items.description: Like a boss...

items.name: Skinny Tie
items.description: Look dapper in this classy skinny tie!

items.name: Red Striped Tie
items.description: I think the stripes say, "I'm classy".

items.name: Turkey Tie 2012
items.description: Gobble Gobble!  Happy Thanksgiving!

items.name: Video Game Tie
items.description: Let's say you're playing a video game and in the game, you have to go to an important business meeting. This is the tie you wear.  Why you're playing games where you go to meetings...I have no idea.

items.name: GoldLika: Troll
items.description: Like a troll...

items.name: Adurite Bow Tie
items.description: This best bow tie will outclass all the other bow ties.

items.name: Classy ROBLOX Bow Tie
items.description: Keepin' it classy, ROBLOX style.  This item came out of the Mysterious ROBLOX Virtual BLOXcon Gift #1 on June 23rd, 2014.

items.name: Hipster Scarf
items.description: How did the hipster burn his tongue? He ate his pizza BEFORE IT WAS COOL!

items.name: Tix Bling
items.description: This necklace is wild and ridiculous, just like you.
